recover.name: Recover Single Orphan Issue
recover.description: Single-issue closure step: read target issue's labels, derive WORKFLOW_LABELS and ACTIONABLE_LABELS from the workflow JSON, verify the issue is recovery-eligible (carries ≥1 workflow label, none actionable), compute orphan_labels = labels ∩ (WORKFLOW_LABELS ∖ ACTIONABLE_LABELS), and emit closing structured output with issue.labels.remove = orphan_labels. The poll:state boundary hook applies the removal via gh issue edit --remove-label. closure_action='label-only' keeps the issue open so triager re-picks it.
